items.name: Software Specifications
items.purpose: Describes the software components, including operating systems, databases, and application software, used in the PMYMS system.

items.name: Operation Manual (PMYMS)
items.purpose: Provides detailed instructions for operating and maintaining the PMYMS system, including troubleshooting and error handling procedures.

value.title: Documentation Control

value.revision: The documentation package will be revised and updated as necessary, based on feedback from JSPL Angul and any changes to the project scope or requirements.
